Address.description: An address with a type (e.g., private address, business address) and a value.

address_uri.description: URI of the address from the Swiss federal building address register. The layer can be accessed at https://map.geo.admin.ch/#/map?topic=ech&layers=ch.swisstopo.amtliches-gebaeudeadressverzeichnis. Example of a valid URI: https://geo.ld.admin.ch/location/address/101904050

Address.title: Address

Citizenship.description: Citizenship (also used for Nationality) of a person indicating the country and temporal validity. If there is no `valid_from` provided, the information is not known. If it is known that the citizenship is valid from birth, the birthdate is to be repeated here. If there is no `valid_through`, the citizenship is still active.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the information is currently valid. Can be useful when this information is explicitly available.

valid_from.description: The date from which the information is valid.

valid_through.description: The date until which the information is valid, inclusive.

Citizenship.title: Citizenship

Contact.description: Contact information of a person indicating a type (e.g., email, LinkedIn) and a value.

value.description: The value of an information besides other attributes such as type, language, etc.

Contact.title: Contact

Container.description: Container for political actors, groups, and relationships.

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

Container.title: Container

ElectoralDistrict.description: Electoral district or region associated with a membership. The temporal validity is inherited from the enclosing membership.

global_uri.description:
For IRI references, LINDAS resources should be used.
The IRIs for the different administrative levels of Swiss spatial units are available at: ch:country/CHE.
Under links in the schema:containsPlace section, the desired level can be selected.
Examples for each administrative level:
- Country - Switzerland: https://ld.admin.ch/country/CHE
- Canton - Aargau: https://ld.admin.ch/canton/19
- District - Brig: https://ld.admin.ch/district/2301
- Municipality - Versoix: https://ld.admin.ch/municipality/6644

label.description: Assign a label to a structured piece of information (e.g., display name, position, etc.).

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

ElectoralDistrict.title: ElectoralDistrict

Gender.description: Gender of a person indicating a gender code and temporal validity.

gender_code.description: Gender code. Recommended values: male, female, diverse.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the information is currently valid. Can be useful when this information is explicitly available.

label.description: Assign a label to a structured piece of information (e.g., display name, position, etc.).

valid_from.description: The date from which the information is valid.

valid_through.description: The date until which the information is valid, inclusive.

Gender.title: Gender

GenderCodeEnum.description: Gender codes for persons. If the gender is not known, no gender entry shall be added. The `diverse` code shall be used together with a label to provide further details about the self-identified gender.
GenderCodeEnum.title: GenderCodeEnum

Group.description: A political group, organization, or body (e.g., party, committee, parliament, department).

contacts.description: Contact information (email, website, social media). Guideline: email is quasi-mandatory and should always be provided where available.

date_created.description: The date when an entity was created.

date_modified.description: The date when an entity was last modified.

datetime_created.description: The date and time when an entity was created.

datetime_modified.description: The date and time when an entity was last modified.

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

group_type.description: Type of group (e.g., party, commission, parliament, or similar). The exact naming and description of the group is provided via `label`.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the information is currently valid. Can be useful when this information is explicitly available.

label.description: Assign a label to a structured piece of information (e.g., display name, position, etc.).

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

parent_groups.description: Link to parent groups. For example, the parent party for cantonal parties, or to describe the hierarchy in the executive. Also used to link sub-commissions to commissions, or factions to both their parliament and their party. (parentGroup is typically used within the same group_type, but cross-type links are permitted, e.g., faction → parliament and faction → party.)

party_color.description: Party color as hexadecimal value (optional for parties, e.g., "#FF0000").

spatial.description: Spatial reference (fos-municipality number, fos-canton number, or country). Formats: municipality: ld.admin.ch/municipality/1234, canton: ld.admin.ch/canton/23, country: ld.admin.ch/country/CHE.

statutes_url.description: URL to party statutes (PDF or webpage; optional for parties).

valid_from.description: The date from which the information is valid.

valid_through.description: The date until which the information is valid, inclusive.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

Group.title: Group

GroupReference.description: Lightweight reference to a group with key identification data at time of linking.

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

label.description: Assign a label to a structured piece of information (e.g., display name, position, etc.).

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

GroupReference.title: GroupReference

GroupType.description: Type of group (e.g., party, committee, parliament, department).

group_type_enum.description: Link to the controlled vocabulary for group types.

label.description: Assign a label to a structured piece of information (e.g., display name, position, etc.).

GroupType.title: GroupType

GroupTypeEnum.description: Types of political groups and organizations.
GroupTypeEnum.title: GroupTypeEnum

HasCreationModificationDates.description: A mixin class that provides slots for modeling creation and modification dates of an entity.

date_created.description: The date when an entity was created.

date_modified.description: The date when an entity was last modified.

datetime_created.description: The date and time when an entity was created.

datetime_modified.description: The date and time when an entity was last modified.

HasCreationModificationDates.title: HasCreationModificationDates

HasIdentification.description: A mixin class that provides slots for the identification of an entity.

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

HasIdentification.title: HasIdentification

HasTemporalValidity.description: A mixin class that provides slots for modeling a temporal validity of information (not of an event).

is_active.description: Indicates whether the information is currently valid. Can be useful when this information is explicitly available.

valid_from.description: The date from which the information is valid.

valid_through.description: The date until which the information is valid, inclusive.

HasTemporalValidity.title: HasTemporalValidity

InterestLink.description: An interest link (conflict of interest, political financing) of a person to an organization outside the actor schema.

committee.description: Committee or board within the organization (e.g., Verwaltungsrat, Stiftungsrat, Vorstand, Aufsichtsrat, Beirat, Geschäftsleitung).

date_created.description: The date when an entity was created.

date_modified.description: The date when an entity was last modified.

datetime_created.description: The date and time when an entity was created.

datetime_modified.description: The date and time when an entity was last modified.

function_role.description: Function or role in the organization (e.g., Präsident/in, Vizepräsident/in, Mitglied, Delegierter, Geschäftsführer/in, Berater/in).

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

interest_type.description: Type of interest link (professional activity, political office, association).

is_active.description: Indicates whether the information is currently valid. Can be useful when this information is explicitly available.

is_paid.description: Indicates if the position is paid.

legal_form.description: Legal form of the organization. See controlled vocabulary: https://register.ld.admin.ch/i14y/concept/legalForm

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

organization_name.description: Name of the organization or enterprise.

organization_uid.description: UID of the organization (eCH-0097 format: CHE-XXX.XXX.XXX) from the federal UID register (uid.admin.ch).

person_reference.description: Reference to a person with snapshot data at time of linking.

valid_from.description: The date from which the information is valid.

valid_through.description: The date until which the information is valid, inclusive.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

InterestLink.title: InterestLink

InterestTypeEnum.description: Types of interest links (conflicts of interest, political financing).
InterestTypeEnum.title: InterestTypeEnum

IsEventWithDuration.description: A mixin class that provides slots for modeling events or occurrences with time duration.

date_begin_actual.description: The actual start date of an event or occurrence with time duration.

date_begin_planned.description: The planned start date of an event or occurrence with time duration.

date_end_actual.description: The actual end date of an event or occurrence with time duration.

date_end_planned.description: The planned end date of an event or occurrence with time duration.

datetime_begin_actual.description: The actual start date and time of an event or occurrence with time duration.

datetime_begin_planned.description: The planned start date and time of an event or occurrence with time duration.

datetime_end_actual.description: The actual end date and time of an event or occurrence with time duration.

datetime_end_planned.description: The planned end date and time of an event or occurrence with time duration.

IsEventWithDuration.title: IsEventWithDuration

IsInstantaneousEvent.description: A mixin class that provides slots for modeling instantaneous events or occurrences (without time duration).

date_actual.description: The actual date of an instantaneous event or occurrence (without time duration).

date_planned.description: The planned date of an instantaneous event or occurrence (without time duration).

datetime_actual.description: The actual date and time of an instantaneous event or occurrence (without time duration).

datetime_planned.description: The planned date and time of an instantaneous event or occurrence (without time duration).

IsInstantaneousEvent.title: IsInstantaneousEvent

IsProcessStep.description:
A mixin class for a single step in a multi-stage process (e.g.,
a deliberation step of an affair or a phase step of a consultation).
Combines identification and event-duration slots and adds a free-text
remark slot. Concrete step classes add their own type-specific slots.

date_begin_actual.description: The actual start date of an event or occurrence with time duration.

date_begin_planned.description: The planned start date of an event or occurrence with time duration.

date_end_actual.description: The actual end date of an event or occurrence with time duration.

date_end_planned.description: The planned end date of an event or occurrence with time duration.

datetime_begin_actual.description: The actual start date and time of an event or occurrence with time duration.

datetime_begin_planned.description: The planned start date and time of an event or occurrence with time duration.

datetime_end_actual.description: The actual end date and time of an event or occurrence with time duration.

datetime_end_planned.description: The planned end date and time of an event or occurrence with time duration.

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

remark.description: Free-text remark or note for edge cases or additional context on a process step or an entity.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

IsProcessStep.title: IsProcessStep

LanguageProficiency.description: Language proficiency of a person indicating the language and whether it is the preferred language or native language.

is_correspondence.description: Indicates if this is the preferred language.

is_native.description: Indicates if this is the native language.

language.description: Language code in ISO 639-1 format (two lowercase letters, e.g. "de", "fr", "it", "en").

LanguageProficiency.title: LanguageProficiency

LegalFormEnum.description: Legal forms based on the Swiss UID register codelist (eCH-0108). See https://register.ld.admin.ch/i14y/concept/legalForm
LegalFormEnum.title: LegalFormEnum

Membership.description: A membership relationship between a person and a group, representing formal affiliation (e.g., party member, commission member, parliamentarian). Distinct from InterestLink, which covers external interest bindings and conflicts of interest to organizations outside the actor schema.

authorized_to_vote.description: Indicates if the person is authorized to vote in the group. Typically false for substitute members (when not deputizing), observers, secretaries, and guests.

date_created.description: The date when an entity was created.

date_modified.description: The date when an entity was last modified.

datetime_created.description: The date and time when an entity was created.

datetime_modified.description: The date and time when an entity was last modified.

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

group_reference.description: Reference to a group with snapshot data at time of linking.

is_active.description: Indicates if the membership is currently active. Can complement or replace `valid_from`/`valid_through`. If not set, activity is derived from the temporal validity fields.

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

person_reference.description: Reference to a person with snapshot data at time of linking.

role_type.description: Role of the person in the membership or function.

valid_from.description: The date from which the information is valid.

valid_through.description: The date until which the information is valid, inclusive.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

Membership.title: Membership

MultilingualValue.description: A multilingual string with language specification.

language.description: Language code in ISO 639-1 format (two lowercase letters, e.g. "de", "fr", "it", "en").

value.description: The value of an information besides other attributes such as type, language, etc.

MultilingualValue.title: MultilingualValue

Name.description: A name with a type (e.g., call name, official name), a value, and a temporal validity.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the information is currently valid. Can be useful when this information is explicitly available.

name_type.description: Type of name according to eCH-0011 (personNameData).

valid_from.description: The date from which the information is valid.

valid_through.description: The date until which the information is valid, inclusive.

value.description: The value of an information besides other attributes such as type, language, etc.

Name.title: Name

NameTypeEnum.description: Categories of name types according to eCH-0011 (personNameData) and https://dam-api.bfs.admin.ch/hub/api/dam/assets/24565576/master, URI according to I14Y identifier but as class and not as attribute. Descriptions and translations according to I14Y.
NameTypeEnum.title: NameTypeEnum

Occupation.description: Occupation or profession of a person indicating a label, an ISCO-19 code, whether the position is paid, and temporal validity.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the information is currently valid. Can be useful when this information is explicitly available.

is_paid.description: Indicates if the position is paid.

label.description: Assign a label to a structured piece of information (e.g., display name, position, etc.).

organization_name.description: Name of the organization or enterprise.

organization_uid.description: UID of the organization (eCH-0097 format: CHE-XXX.XXX.XXX) from the federal UID register (uid.admin.ch).

valid_from.description: The date from which the information is valid.

valid_through.description: The date until which the information is valid, inclusive.

Occupation.title: Occupation

Person.description: A person with identifiers, names, addresses, citizenships, and occupations.

birth_date.description: Exact date of birth if available and public. This field has precedence over the field `birthYear`.

birth_year.description: Year of birth. Only to be used, if there is no full `birthDate` available.

contacts.description: Contact information (email, website, social media). Guideline: email is quasi-mandatory and should always be provided where available.

date_created.description: The date when an entity was created.

date_modified.description: The date when an entity was last modified.

datetime_created.description: The date and time when an entity was created.

datetime_modified.description: The date and time when an entity was last modified.

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

label.description: Mandatory short display name to identify the person within the organisation (e.g. with added birth year to distinguish persons with the same name). Preferred: PersonOfficialName combined with PersonCallFirstName.

label_long.description: Optional long display name including academic titles and full official name (e.g. "Dr. Maria Muster-Beispiel").

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

names.description: Names of the person with type and value.

occupations.description: Occupations or professions of the person.

picture.description: Link to an image (preferred: PNG, then JPG, then GIF).

trainings.description: Trainings or educations of the person. Guideline: generally only provide the highest qualification obtained.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

Person.title: Person

PersonReference.description: Lightweight reference to a person with key identification data at time of linking. Preserves historical accuracy even if the person changes later.

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

group_label.description: Name of the body/group at time of linking.

label.description: Mandatory short display name to identify the person within the organisation (e.g. with added birth year to distinguish persons with the same name).

label_long.description: Optional long display name including academic titles and full official name (e.g. "Dr. Maria Muster-Beispiel").

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

PersonReference.title: PersonReference

RoleEnum.description: Roles a person can have within a membership.
RoleEnum.title: RoleEnum

RoleType.description: Role of a person in a membership or function (e.g., member, president, deputy). If a role is not listed in the proposed RoleEnum vocabulary, the value 'other' can be used, and a descriptive label should be provided in the `role_label` slot. The label can also be used when a specific name is needed, even if a fitting semantic value exists in `role_type_enum`; it should be provided when `role_type_enum` is set to 'other'.

role_label.description: Specific role label. Use this when a specific role name is needed, even if a fitting semantic value exists in `role_type_enum`; provide this label when `role_type_enum` is set to 'other'.

role_type_enum.description: Role of the person in the membership or function.

RoleType.title: RoleType

Training.description: Training or education of a person indicating a type (e.g., school diploma, university degree, military service), a label, an ISCO-19 code, and temporal validity.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the information is currently valid. Can be useful when this information is explicitly available.

training_code.description: ISCO-19 code of the training or education.

valid_from.description: The date from which the information is valid.

valid_through.description: The date until which the information is valid, inclusive.

value.description: The value of an information besides other attributes such as type, language, etc.

Training.title: Training

TrainingTypeEnum.description: Types of training or education based on the Swiss BFS LEVEL_EDUC codelist.
TrainingTypeEnum.title: TrainingTypeEnum

description: Container for political actors, groups, and relationships.

global_uri.description: A unique, globally valid URI for the entity.

local_id.description: Local identifier. For example, a UUID from the council information system.

wikidata_uri.description: A URI that refers to a Wikidata entity, e.g. http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q39 for Switzerland.

title: actors-schema
